name: Aurora Skies
bio: Ethereal electro-pop built on shimmering synths and wide, cinematic choruses.

name: Night Drive
bio: Retro synthwave for empty highways and neon skylines.

name: Solace
bio: Minimal piano and ambient textures for focus and calm.

name: Ember & Oak
bio: Warm indie-folk harmonies with acoustic grit.

name: Pulsewave
bio: High-energy electronic dance built for the main stage.

name: Low Tide
bio: Lo-fi grooves and mellow beats to drift along to.
